title: Gunjan Tailor
summary: Gunjan Tailor is a solution-oriented software professional with 8.5 years of experience in backend development, test automation, and cloud technologies. Skilled in .NET Core, C#, MS SQL, and Azure, with expertise in REST API development and CI/CD pipelines. Currently a Senior Software Engineer at Synechron Technologies.
insights: 8.5 years of backend and automation engineering experience
Expertise in .NET Core C#, MS SQL, Azure, and REST API development
Led end-to-end test automation frameworks using Selenium and Playwright
Experience across BFSI domain at Synechron and Capgemini
